---
title: "Paper"
---

The manuscript is available as a PDF download and is also rendered inline below.

::: {.callout-note}
The manuscript is a work in progress. This page will be updated as the paper develops.
:::

[Download PDF](assets/manuscript.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

## Abstract



## Introduction

*(See [Methods](methods.qmd) for pipeline details.)*

## Results

*(See [Results](results.qmd).)*

## Case Study: Carbon Capture

*(See [Case Study: Carbon Capture](case-study.qmd).)*

## Discussion

*(To be written.)*

## References

*(Managed in `manuscript/references.bib`.)*
